prompt: Apply my style to this document: ~/.claude/skills/apply-style-workspace/test-docs/test1-rate-limiting.md
assertions: No filler phrases like 'it is important to note', 'in this document we will', 'in conclusion', 'it is worth mentioning'
Contains at least 2 Obsidian-style callouts using '> [!type]' syntax
The three strategies each have a consistent emoji assigned
Contains at least one markdown comparison table
Callout content uses bullet points, not prose paragraphs
Uses inline code formatting for technical terms
The recommendation appears in a prominent [!important] callout
